  1. 3,222
  2. 3,422
  3. 1,622
  4. 3783
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
What is the compound interest on a sum of Rs. 31250 at 18% p.a. in 2 years, if the interest is compounded 8-monthly ?

  1. 12654
  2. 12664
  3. 12754
  4. 13654
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
A sum of money invested at compound interest amounts to 3 times itself in 5 years. In how many years will it become 9 times itself?

  1. 10 years
  2. 15 years
  3. 12 years
  4. 18 years
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
A vendor lends 84,000 rupees at a rate of 12 % compound interest per annum, compounded annually. Find the interest for the 3rd year.

  1. 10,000.35
  2. 11,000
  3. 12,644.35
  4. 12,000
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
What is the compound interest on Rs. 12000 for 2 years at 10% per annum?

  1. 2425
  2. 2520
  3. 2540
  4. 2625
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
Rohan invested a certain sum of money at compound interest. The amount becomes three times of the original sum in 3 years.What is the rate of interest per annum?

  1. 44.2%
  2. 43.3%
  3. 50%
  4. 78%
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
What will be the amount to be paid at the end of 5 years on Rs. 4000 at 20% per annum compounded annually?

  1. 9,265.3
  2. 9545.3
  3. 9953.2
  4. 9,145.3
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
What will be the compound interest on a sum of Rs. 21,000 after 3 years at the rate of 10% p.a.?

  1. 6,951
  2. 6,421
  3. 6,541
  4. 6,351
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
A sum of money triples itself at compound interest in 10 years. In how many years will it become nine times ?

  1. 20
  2. 25
  3. 30
  4. 15
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
The compound interest on a certain sum for 2 years at 25% per annum is Rs. 625. Find the simple interest on the same sum at the same rate and period.

  1. Rs. 480.25
  2. Rs. 520.75
  3. Rs. 555.55
  4. Rs. 600.50
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
Arya lent Siya Rs. 10,000 for three years at 5% annual compound interest. What will be the total amount Arya will receive after 3 years ?

  1. Rs. 11,576.25
  2. Rs. 11,750.25
  3. Rs. 11,749.25
  4. Rs. 11,649.25
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
Calculate the compound interest on Rs. 6400 for 1 year at 25% per annum when compounded half-yearly.

  1. 2300
  2. 1700
  3. 2250
  4. 1300
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
Mahesh invested an amount of Rs. 6000 in a fixed deposit scheme for 3 years at a compound interest rate of 5% p.a. How much will Mahesh get on maturity of the fixed deposit ?

  1. 6,945.75
  2. 6,945.25
  3. 6,345.75
  4. 6,955.75
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
A certain sum amounts to Rs. 1,800 in two years and to Rs. 2,160 in three years at compound interest when compounded annually. Find the rate of interest.

  1. 18%
  2. 16%
  3. 25%
  4. 20%
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
If the amount is Rs. 700 and the Principal is Rs. 500, which is compounded yearly for 1 year, calculate the rate of interest.

  1. 40%
  2. 35%
  3. 33.33%
  4. 25%
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
Radha invested Rs. 20,000 in a savings scheme that offers interest at the rate of 10% per annum, compounded annually. Find the compound interest earned by her at the end of 2 years and 6 months.

  1. Rs. 5,450
  2. Rs. 5,410
  3. Rs. 5,430
  4. Rs. 5,420
subject: Mathematics
